Race-Elf-Miransil — Male Miransil Elf Fighter
Strength: 9 (-1) Dexterity: 16 (+3) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: None Alignment: Chaotic Good
Experience: 292/300 Level: 1 Size: Medium Speed: 35 Carry/Lift: 135/270
Ability Notes:
Elf Ability Adjustment: +2 Dexterity
Miransil Ability Adjustment: +1 Wisdom
Born Of The Sea: Can use a bonus action to breathe water for 1 hr once per short rest
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: General: 0 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style)
Miransil Elf Features: Born Of The Sea; Darkvision; Elf Ability Adjustment; Elf Skills; Fey Ancestry; Miransil Ability Adjustment; Miransil Skills; Miransil Weapon Training; Trance Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighting Style (Dueling); Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Trance: 4 hr meditation gives the benefits of 8 hr sleep
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +5 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +5 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +3
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +5 Survival: (wis) +3
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Athletics; Insight; Perception
Tool Proficiency: Water Vehicles
Languages: Colonial; High Elven; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes:
Born Of The Sea: Tool Proficiency (Water Vehicles)
Elf Skills: Language (High Elven)
Miransil Skills: Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Insight)/Language (Colonial; Trader's Tongue)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Combat
Hit Points: 8 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 16
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Javelin; Martial Weapons; Scimitar; Simple Weapons; Trident
Armor: Chain Mail Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+5 1d4+3 P R20/60); Inutek (+5 None R5/15); Trident (+1 1d6-1 P [2h d8] R20/60); Unarmed Strike (+1 1-1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Miransil Weapon Training: Weapon Proficiency (Javelin; Trident)
Strength Attack Adjustment: -1
Strength Damage Adjustment: -1
Fighting Style (Dueling): Inflicts +2 HP with a single, one-handed melee weapon
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points once per short rest
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +3
Save Notes: Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charm and immunity to magical sleep
